## What

<!-- One sentence: what was added or changed. -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New workflow
- [ ] New config / template
- [ ] New MCP server definition
- [ ] New prompt
- [ ] Update to existing content
- [ ] Documentation only

## Why

<!-- What use case does this serve? Why does it belong in a base config repo? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded project-specific values (use `{{placeholders}}` for variables)
- [ ] No secrets committed — sensitive files use `.example` suffix
- [ ] Each new file/directory has a `README.md` or is documented in its parent `README.md`
- [ ] Naming follows existing conventions
- [ ] Consistent with existing content in the same category
- [ ] Top-level `README.md` updated if a new top-level section was added
